name: Literature Digest
description: Generate digests and extract references from academic paper source files.

prompts.gemini:
Please call the skill named "{{ skill.id }}".

Please ingest the source file at `{{ input.source_path }}`. The input may be markdown, PDF, or an extensionless file; determine format from file content as defined in SKILL.md.
Execute the internal staged pipeline exactly as defined in SKILL.md:
1) normalize the input into `<cwd>/.literature_digest_tmp/source.md`
2) write `digest.md`
3) stage references via hidden artifacts (`references_scope.json`, `references.parts/part-*.json`, `references_merged.json`) and only publish `references.json` after merge validation passes
4) stage citation analysis via hidden artifacts (`citation_scope.json`, `citation_preprocess.json`, `citation.parts/part-*.json`, `citation_merged.json`, `citation_report.md`) and only publish `citation_analysis.json` after report generation and merge validation pass
5) if any staged references/citation step fails, return a schema-compatible error with the stage-specific `error.code` defined in SKILL.md

Do not one-shot generate the full `references.json` or `citation_analysis.json` directly. Output only the final stdout JSON object defined in SKILL.md.

Input Context:
- source_path: {{ input.source_path }}
- language: {{ parameter.language }}
